item.description:
What's New

  • Improved Microphone Selection - Enhanced the algorithm for selecting redundant recording input devices, resulting in more reliable audio capture across different hardware configurations

What's New

  • Credit Limits - Added enforcement for free plan credit limits. When you run out of credits, AI-based features will be limited.
  • Improved Hotkey Selection - Updated the hotkey selection screen with clearer instructions on how to speak with EVY. The visual layout now makes it more obvious which modifier keys (left or right) to select.
  • System Audio Improvements - Enhanced system audio capture for meeting recordings, with redundant recording of input and output to improve reliability during Zoom calls.
  • Enhanced AI Transcription - Improved AI-enhanced dictation rules to preserve more meaningful words while maintaining accuracy.
  • Microphone Setup - Prioritized the default Mac microphone selection and added system audio monitoring as part of the microphone setup process.
  • Empty Recording Handling - Meeting recordings with very short or empty audio files now show an "empty" status instead of failing completely.
  • Recording Capsule Hiding - Added ability to temporarily hide the recording capsule for one hour to keep your screen focused.

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where users would be dropped back into the onboarding flow after completing the context interview.
  • Fixed a bug where the meeting recording voice pill could get stuck on animation.
  • Fixed an issue where the retrying voice pill could not be dismissed by clicking the close button.
  • Fixed a bug where meeting recordings would fail when dictating or using the agent during recording.
  • Fixed how the voice recording pill displays when using team accounts.
  • Hid the meeting recording force stop window for a cleaner experience.
  • Relaxed timeouts to give more space for the server when processing large amounts of audio packets.

What's New

  • Improved AI Dictation - Fine-tuned the AI-enhanced dictation to preserve meaningful phrases like "I believe" and "maybe" while still removing filler sounds, resulting in more natural and accurate transcriptions
  • Extended Interview Sessions - Interviews and secondary agents no longer time out after brief inactivity, giving you more time to think and respond at your own pace

Bug Fixes

  • Fixed an issue where the Settings window would not reappear after being closed during the onboarding flow
  • Fixed a crash that could occur when reopening previously closed windows
  • Fixed the update button in the menu bar tray not being clickable when a new release is available
  • Fixed a type error that could cause AI-enhanced dictation to malfunction
  • Improved server connection stability by relaxing timeout thresholds to reduce false disconnections
